title: Just Think!
content:
Just think! some night the stars will gleam
        Upon a cold, grey stone,
        And trace a name with silver beam,
        And lo! 'twill be your own.

        That night is speeding on to greet
        Your epitaphic rhyme.
        Your life is but a little beat
        Within the heart of Time.

        A little gain, a little pain,
        A laugh, lest you may moan;
        A little blame, a little fame,
        A star-gleam on a stone.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert William Service, titled "Just Think!", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
